headline: SpaceX stock gains, space companies fall, chips mixed on IPO news
summary: Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma joins Market Domination to tackle today's top trending tickers, including the momentum driving SpaceX (SPCX) shares in Friday's session after the company's IPO, the impact it is having on other space stocks Virgin Galactic (SPCE) and Rocket Lab (RKLB), and how semiconductor stocks such as Micron Technology (MU) and Nvidia (NVDA) are moving on the historic public offering.

headline: Arm Rockets 11%, Qualcomm Rises 5%: Who’s Winning the Chip-Architecture Race?
summary: Shares of Arm (NASDAQ:ARM) are up 11% in midday trading on Friday, June 12, changing hands near $379. Qualcomm (NASDAQ:QCOM) stock is also rallying, climbing 5% to trade near $213. Both moves come after a choppy stretch for the chip-architecture group, with Arm and Qualcomm shares snapping back together. The purest IP peers in electronic ... headline: Buy, Hold, or Sell: Arm Holdings Shed 25% to Clear the Air as the Warsh Fed Digs In. Is It a Buy at $342?
summary: At $342.23, Arm Holdings (NASDAQ:ARM) appears fairly valued, with a more attractive entry point sitting at or below $310 on any macro-driven technical consolidation. The stock has become the cleanest pure-play on agentic AI infrastructure, but the round trip from $100 to $428 and back to the mid-$300s in six months argues for patience over ... headline: AMD and Qualcomm Shares Are Soaring, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session after the Nasdaq rebounded, up 1.8%, as Trump's Iran peace deal announcement released the rate pressure that weighed on the sector all week.
